name: find-and-read
description: Search patterns in file(s)/dir or read line ranges (file:start-end), in one call with absolute line numbers.

parameters.name: file_or_dir
parameters.description: File path, or dir with -r; line ranges as file:start-end (multiple allowed)

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Search pattern; -e pat1 -e pat2 for multi-pattern

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses grep+sed/cat into one call and batches multi-pattern/multi-range reads, saving 1-3 steps.
